instruction: Extract all core computer science concepts from the following lecture JSON. Return only a newline-separated list of unique concepts. Do not explain anything.

text_blocks.text: I just want to use this time to point out that “Virtual Reality” is an oxymoron.

text_blocks.text: Physical addressing is when hardware relates a program address directly to the memory hardware.

text_blocks.text: The program addresses are the exact physical locations of data.

text_blocks.text: Physical addressing is useful when you have only a single, simple process.

text_blocks.text: However, we don’t always have such simple cases.

runs.text: However, we don’t always have such simple cases.

text_blocks.text: A general-purpose system, like our phones and desktop machines, can run a variety of programs.

runs.text: A general-purpose system, like our phones and desktop machines, can run a variety of programs.

text_blocks.text: We often have multitasking operating systems running many programs at the same time.

runs.text: running many programs at the same time.

text_blocks.text: When we have several processes, how to we manage memory?

runs.text: When we have several processes, how to we manage memory?

text_blocks.text: How to present a consistent address space?

runs.text: How to present a consistent address space?

text_blocks.text: How to prevent other processes from interfering?

runs.text: How to prevent other processes from interfering?

text_blocks.text: How to prevent address space fragmentation?

runs.text: How to prevent address space fragmentation?

text_blocks.text: The solution, as usual: indirection: Virtual Memory.
Just like “virtual reality,” we create a world that resembles reality, but it really is a facsimile.

runs.text: Just like “virtual reality,” we create a world that resembles reality, but it really is a facsimile.

text_blocks.text: We can provide a scheme, backed by hardware, that allows memory addresses to be seen by programs in a specific place…

runs.text: We can provide a scheme, backed by hardware, that allows memory addresses to be seen by programs in a specific place…

text_blocks.text: Yet, those addresses differ from the actual physical memory location.

runs.text: Yet, those addresses differ from the actual physical memory location.

text_blocks.text: Segmentation is a virtual memory system where spans of physical memory called a segment are given a physical base address.

are given a physical base address.

The first segment defines a range of addresses from 0x7fde0000 to 0x7fde2fff.

text_blocks.text: The Memory Management Unit (MMU) is a hardware component of your CPU that translates virtual addresses to physical addresses.

runs.text: (MMU) is a hardware component of your CPU that translates virtual addresses to physical addresses.

text_blocks.text: Here, it translates based on the segment table.

runs.text: Here, it translates based on the segment table.
